design_note: Each of the 11 corrected Transactions endpoints has exactly 40 functional test cases. Missing and invalid inputs are split into separate granular cases rather than lumped into generic validations.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Transactions by Card
functional_requirements: FR-TRX-API-01-01: Allow authorized users to retrieve transaction history for a specified card within permitted scope.
FR-TRX-API-01-02: Enforce IAM scope validation before returning card transaction history.
FR-TRX-API-01-03: Support filtering card transaction history by transaction status.
FR-TRX-API-01-04: Support filtering card transaction history by date range.
FR-TRX-API-01-05: Support pagination for card transaction history datasets.

FR-TRX-API-01-06: Return transaction identifier, merchant information where available, transaction type, amount, currency, status, source reference, authorization code where available, and transaction timestamp.
FR-TRX-API-01-07: Return card transaction history in normalized platform transaction format.
FR-TRX-API-01-08: Restrict Affiliate users to cards within tenant or affiliate scope.
FR-TRX-API-01-09: Restrict Issuing Bank users to cards issued within bank scope.
FR-TRX-API-01-10: Allow Service Provider users to retrieve card transaction history globally in read-only mode.

endpoints.name: Query Transactions
functional_requirements: FR-TRX-API-05-01: Allow authorized users to retrieve transactions using filter-based query criteria.
FR-TRX-API-05-02: Support filtering by bank identifier.
FR-TRX-API-05-03: Support filtering by affiliate identifier.
FR-TRX-API-05-04: Support filtering by customer identifier where available.
FR-TRX-API-05-05: Support filtering by card identifier.
FR-TRX-API-05-06: Support filtering by transaction type.
FR-TRX-API-05-07: Support filtering by transaction status.
FR-TRX-API-05-08: Support filtering by date range.
FR-TRX-API-05-09: Support filtering by source reference and merchant name where available.
FR-TRX-API-05-10: Support pagination for queried transaction datasets.
FR-TRX-API-05-11: Enforce IAM scope validation before returning query results.
FR-TRX-API-05-12: Restrict Affiliate users to transactions within tenant or affiliate scope.
FR-TRX-API-05-13: Restrict Issuing Bank users to transactions within bank portfolio scope.
FR-TRX-API-05-14: Allow Service Provider users to retrieve transactions globally in read-only mode.
FR-TRX-API-05-15: Reject invalid query filters or unsupported filter combinations.
FR-TRX-API-05-16: Return queried transaction data in normalized platform transaction format.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Affiliate Transaction Volume
functional_requirements: FR-TRX-API-10-01: Provide aggregated funding volume for a specified affiliate.
FR-TRX-API-10-02: Derive returned funding volume from transaction records within the specified affiliate scope.
FR-TRX-API-10-03: Include a response generation timestamp.
FR-TRX-API-10-04: Record an audit log for volume retrieval where audit policy requires it.
